I asked my daughter if I was unfilial since every time my phone rings now with either ID of Mom or Dad, I think,  "Oh god, what now." There have been many calls on top of the visits that begin with "We have a problem." 
It's not easy getting older with complications. Luckily I'm able to help.

data.body: How did Kaifeng's old Jewish community go from revival to erasure? @jordynhaime.bsky.social traces the forces that recast Judaism as foreign in China, from missionaries to rising nationalism to CCP ethnic policy, asking whether any revival is possible without rethinking the Chinese nation itself.
